creator: hodong@nimfsoft.art
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #19)

Hello.

1) No CPU cores are 100% busy. It was confirmed with gnome-system-monitor and top.

2) In /etc/rc.conf, powerd_enable="YES" or #powerd_enable="YES" has the same problem.

3) pciconf -lv

4) dmesg | grep xhci
xhci0: <XHCI (generic) USB 3.0 controller> mem 0xfcea0000-0xfcea7fff irq 28 at device 0.0 on pci1
xhci0: 32 bytes context size, 64-bit DMA
usbus0 on xhci0
xhci1: <XHCI (generic) USB 3.0 controller> mem 0xfca00000-0xfcafffff irq 55 at device 0.3 on pci7
xhci1: 64 bytes context size, 64-bit DMA
usbus1 on xhci1

Thank you.
